```{r setup, echo = FALSE}
answer <- 7
```

Question
========

Use the summary table.

<table class="dataframe" style="border-collapse: collapse;">
  <thead>
    <tr>
      <th style="text-align:left;">Group</th>
      <th style="text-align:right;">n</th>
      <th style="text-align:right;">Mean</th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr>
      <td style="font-weight:bold;">A</td>
      <td align="right">7</td>
      <td></td>
    </tr>
  </tbody>
</table>

How many observations are in group A? `r exams::add_cloze(answer)`

Solution
========

The table reports 7 observations for group A.

Meta-information
================
extype: cloze
exname: Table cloze
exclozetype: `r exams::format_metainfo("type")`
exsolution: `r exams::format_metainfo("solution")`
extol: `r exams::format_metainfo("tolerance")`
expoints: 1
